author: IGN YouTube
text:
Resident Evil - Official 'Zach Cregger on Survival Horror' Behind-The-Scenes Clip (2026)
Join director/co-writer/producer Zach Cregger for a discussion about survival horror and a behind-the-scenes look at the upcoming Resident Evil movie. In an all-new story, Resident Evil follows Bryan (Austin Abrams), a medical courier who unwittingly finds himself in an action-packed, non-stop race for survival as one fateful, horrifying night collapses around him in chaos. The Resident Evil movie will also stars Paul Walter Hauser, Zach Cherry, and Kali Reis.

Resident Evil is written by Zach Cregger & Shay Hatten. It is produced by Robert Kulzer, Zach Cregger, Roy Lee, Miri Yoon, Carter Swan, and Asad Qizilbash. Oliver Berben, Victor Hadida, Richard Wright, and Robert Bernacci serve as executive producers.

Resident Evil opens in theaters on September 18, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Exodus - Official 'Into a Volcanic Hellscape' Gameplay
Take a tour of the most volcanically active world in the Malakbel system in this latest Exodus video, highlighting work-in-progress gameplay from the upcoming sci-fi action-adventure RPG. The new video showcases Jun Aslan, along with companions Elise and Phaedra, as they pass through a cave with toxic yellow mist and walls coated in condensed sulfur. We also get to see a deep volcanic crater, and a derelict starship half-buried in the landscape.

Extended gameplay for Exodus will be revealed in summer 2026.

Exodus will be available on PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X/S, and PC in 2027.

Exodus is a sci-fi action-adventure RPG where you become the Traveler—leading humanity’s fight for survival against the Celestials. Face our evolution 40,000 years in the future, explore extraordinary worlds, and confront time itself to shape the fate of generations.​

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Thick As Thieves - Official Launch Trailer
Thick As Thieves is available now on Steam. Watch the Thick As Thieves launch trailer for this stealth action heist game. Thick as Thieves is playable solo or with a partner in crime in co-op multiplayer, where you will master the art of thievery. Set in the shadow-draped city of Kilcairn, where magic meets early tech, no two heists play out the same in Thick As Thieves. Adapt, improvise, and take what’s yours—before someone else does.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Pressure - Official Trailer #2 (2026) Brendan Fraser, Andrew Scott, Kerry Condon
Check out the new trailer for Pressure, an upcoming film starring Andrew Scott, Brendan Fraser, Kerry Condon, Chris Messina, and Damian Lewis.

In the tense 72 hours before D-Day, and with the fate of the free world hanging in the balance, Pressure follows General Dwight D. Eisenhower and Captain James Stagg as they face an impossible choice—launch the largest and most dangerous seaborne invasion in history or risk losing the war altogether.

Pressure is written by David Haig and Anthony Maras. It is produced by Tim Bevan, Eric Fellner, Cass Marks, and Lucas Webb. Anna Marsh, Ron Halpern, Joe Naftalin, Anthony Maras, Angela Moneke, and Sheeraz Shah serve as executive producers. 

Pressure, directed by Anthony Maras, opens in theaters on May 29, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Six One Indie May Showcase
Join us on May 21st, 2026 at 11:50 AM ET / 8:50 AM PT for 61 indie games in 93 minutes! 


We’ve got world premieres, debut trailers, and a bunch of awesome indie games from all over the world; some you’ve been waiting for, and plenty you haven’t even heard of yet. 


The Six One Indie Showcase was created to give indie developers a platform, especially those who might not have the resources to break into the traditional showcase scene. What started as a scrappy passion project has grown into a professionally produced event, and seven showcases later, our mission hasn’t changed. No paywalls, no barriers: just a spotlight for indie devs to take center stage and shine.


Zero barriers. Zero ads spots. Zero nonsense. Just games.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Grave Seasons - Official Demo Launch Trailer | Six One Indie Showcase May 2026
Get a look at the Console Release Date Trailer for Grave Seasons, a narrative farming simulation game developed by Perfect Garbage. Players will embark on a farming adventure with a terrifying twist – someone in the town is a supernatural serial killer. Farm, romance, and investigate your way through the unsettling town of Ashenridge. Grave Seasons is launching on August 14 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, Xbox Cloud, and PC (Xbox on PC and Steam), with a demo launching on June 15 for PC (Steam and Xbox on PC).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
SacriFire - Official Trailer | Six One Indie Showcase May 2026
SacriFire is an upcoming RPG boasting a unique combat system, elaborate pixel art, and music by genre legend Motoi Sakuraba. Ezekiel Ridan, a young priest, struggles to keep his faith as the world he loves is threatened by a war between gods and demons. The adventure begins!
Head over to Steam and add SacriFire to your Wishlist.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Fraymakers - Official Spelunky Launch Trailer | Six One Indie Showcase May 2026
Watch the Spelunky Launch Trailer for Fraymakers, a 2D action fighting game developed by Team Fray and McLeodGaming. Players will fight with a cast of some of indie gaming's biggest icons. Duke it out with up to 4 players and call on assists to help out in the heat of battle. Create and play custom characters, stages, modes, and more for infinite fun! Acess Spelunky now in Fraymakers for PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Gang of Frogs - Official Playtest Trailer | Six One Indie Showcase May 2026
Don't miss the Playtest Trailer for Gangs of Frogs, the third-person action co-op shooter developed by Aska Studios. Players will sail through the galaxy as a fearless outlaw frog. Plunder loot, upgrade weapons, eat flies and fight through hordes of monstrous bugs in an intense 1-4 player co-op shooter. Gang of Frogs is coming soon to PC (Steam), with sign ups for the upcoming playtest are available now on Steam.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Agni: Village of Calamity - Official Announcement Trailer | Six One Indie Showcase May 2026
Watch the Announcement Trailer for Agni: Village of Calamity, a third-person puzzle exploration game developed by Separuh Interactive. Players will embody Agni, a determined investigator from a covert Indonesian police unit who defied orders and ventures into a remote village despite ominous warnings. What begins as an unauthorized investigation quickly plunges Agni into a horrifying reality. Agni: Village of Calamity is coming soon to PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Florist - Official Gameplay Teaser Trailer | Six One Indie Showcase May 2026
Don't miss the Gameplay Trailer for The Florist, a classic survival exploration adventure game developed by Unclear Games. Players will traverse a town overgrown with deadly yet beautiful flowers. Solve ingenious puzzles, defeat horrifying enemies, and uncover the mystery behind a plan to create new life in the most inhuman way imaginable. The Florist is coming soon to PlayStation 5 (PS5), Nintendo Switch 2, and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Kaiju Cleanup - Official Gameplay Trailer | Six One Indie Showcase May 2026
Take a look at the Launch Trailer for Kaiju Cleanup, a relaxing first-person cleaning simulation game developed by Brightrock Games. Players will slice up and tidy away Kaiju carcasses, leaving the city clean and serene. Until the next Kaiju attack, obviously. Kaiju Cleanup is coming soon to PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Mayak - Official Trailer | Six One Indie Showcase May 2026
A signal from a star // 3571 → 3559 → 3557 → … → 0 // 336 years left // You and her, staring at the sky
Head over to Steam and add Mayak to your Wishlist.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
RUST x Warhammer 40,000 - Official Pack Console Launch Trailer
Get a look at the Warhammer 40,000 Pack for RUST: Console Edition, the hit open-world survival crafting game developed by Facepunch Studios. Players can now gain access to the Warhammer 40,000 Pack, fitted with the Hazmat Suit, Chainsaw, Shotgun, Storage Barrels, Backpack, and more to bring the Warhammer flair to Rust. The Warhammer 40,000 Pack is available now in RUST for PlayStation 5 (PS5) and Xbox Series X|S.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Warhammer Age of Sigmar: Deathmaster - Official Announcement Trailer
Watch the Announcement Trailer for Warhammer Age of Sigmar: Deathmaster, a 2D side-scrolling action game developed by Old Skull Games and Dotemu. Players can get a cryptic tease at the unsettling nature of the new inclusion to the Warhammer universe. Warhammer Age of Sigmar: Deathmaster is coming soon to PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC (Steam).

#ign #gaming
